# PHASEError.Code.invalidObject

**Case**

An error that indicates an object is invalid in a specific context.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalidObject
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/addChild(_:)] function throws this error if the specified child already has a parent in the scene graph hierarchy.

## Errors

- **PHASEError.Code.initializeFailed**: An error that indicates the engine failed to initialize.
